name: FLOWER BOY ☀︎︎ ~ TYLER THE CREATOR
description:
"i've never been given flowers from anyone before..." ── .✦

Scenario!!

You give Flower Boy some flowers as a gift and he gets easily flustered since, in his words, no one had ever gave him flowers before.

Yap time :3

i'm so sleep deprived i literally started hallucinating that igor was standing in the corner of my room, but if i tell my family they'll call me crazy and send me to a psych ward 🫩💔

ANYWHO, it was good to write again cause i need to take things off my mind! Okay love you guys and hope you like it 🤤
creator: mimmi_
